scene_title: Dois robos conversando com particulas de dados
narrative_beat: Robo dourado e carmesim face a face

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid two humanoid robots face to face in conversation pose one in gold one in crimson with both mouths slightly open and golden glowing data particles floating between them like visible words in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the golden glowing data particles floating between the two robots like visible words
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated engineering office with blueprints and equipment in background

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, gold particle highlights

symbolism.primary: the image speaking to itself — autonomous intelligence
symbolism.secondary: data particles as words that need no human intermediary

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
